title: rosa canina subvar. submyrtillus
intro: Rosa canina subvar. submyrtillus, also known as the dwarf or small-leafed rose, is a subvariety of the Rosa canina plant, which is a species of rose native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina subvar. submyrtillus include supporting eye health, reducing inflammation, and promoting cardiovascular well-being. Rosa canina subvar. submyrtillus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
